name: financial-ui-suite
description: Production-grade financial UI design skills for Claude Code. Two composable layers: financial-ui-patterns (correctness — tabular nums, semantic tokens, tick flash, accessibility, charts) and financial-ui-styles (aesthetic — 13 distinct visual systems: Bloomberg terminal, TradingView, Robinhood, Coinbase, Financial Times, Massive/Stripe, Wise, TastyTrade, Uniswap, iOS Stocks, Yahoo Finance, AlphaSense, and Yahoo AlphaSpace).
